_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/006 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Mia; computer plays Sam. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 006 · Balloons

routes.meaning: Mia is excited and asks how many balloons.
routes.hint: Ask how many: “Wow! How many balloons?”

routes.meaning: Mia only says wow, nice balloons.

partial.message: Ask about them: “Wow! How many balloons?”

off_topic.message: Sam has balloons! Say “Wow! How many balloons?”

npc.text: Thank you! Do you want to count them?

off_topic.message: Let us count! Say “How many balloons?”

routes.meaning: Mia says she likes the red balloon.
routes.hint: Say which you like: “I like the red balloon.”

routes.meaning: Mia says she likes a different color balloon.
routes.hint: You can say “I like the red balloon.” or name another color.

partial.message: Tell Sam which you like: “I like the red balloon.”

off_topic.message: There are three balloons! Say “I like the red balloon.”

routes.meaning: Mia points out the green balloon is big.
examples: Look! The green balloon is big.
Look, the green one is big.
The green balloon is so big.
routes.hint: Say what is big: “Look! The green balloon is big.”

routes.meaning: Mia says the blue one is nice.
routes.hint: Nice! You can also say “Look! The green balloon is big.”

partial.message: Look at the big one: “Look! The green balloon is big.”

off_topic.message: Sam likes blue! Say “Look! The green balloon is big.”

routes.meaning: Mia says yes and gives Sam a balloon.
examples: Yes, you can. Here you are.
routes.hint: Give one to Sam: “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

routes.meaning: Mia says the balloons are hers.
routes.hint: You can share! Say “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

partial.message: Share a balloon: “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

off_topic.message: Sam wants one. Say “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

examples: Yes, you can. Here you are.
routes.hint: Share the balloon: “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

partial.message: Just one! Say “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

off_topic.message: Please share. Say “Yes, you can. Here you are.”

npc.text: Thank you! Red is my favorite.

partial.message: Say how you feel: “Balloons are fun!”

off_topic.message: Red is Sam's favorite! Say “Balloons are fun!”

npc.text: Yes! Balloons are so much fun. Thank you!
